choices: Meet the Family Dreemurr (Chara is alive)
Meet Flowey (as 9th Fallen Human, Frisk live with Toriel)
Meet Nice Flowey then meet Toriel (Unaware/Aware)
1.content:
Long ago, two races ruled over Earth: HUMANS and MONSTER GIRLS.
One day, war broke out between the two races. After a long battle, the humans were victorious.
They sealed the monsters underground with a magic spell. After the monsters were sealed humanity had sole rule over the Earth.

Soon the once unified human race began to split into two distinct races due to leftover monster magic. The leftover magic of the monsters affect some portion of the humanity on surfaces and those that fall into the barrier they shrunken as they beings struggled to survive in a world now suddenly too big for them. On the surfaces It didn’t help that their normal sized brethren were either indifferent towards their plight or downright malicious. Life for a shrunken was typically harsh, short, and usually ended painfully at the foot of a being far bigger than them. Still the shrunken people made due and life went on.

Many years later...

MT. Ebott 201X.

Legends say that those who climb the mountain never return.

(shrunken size from: nearly or 1 foot tall)
1.title: Intro

choices: Toriel sees you and picks you up
Toriel sees you but punishes you for runnin' with feet (gentle crush, no Death)
Toriel sees you and wants to play a game (Intimiate or not)
See her on the couch reading and goes to her foot
Climb her couch while she return (Buttcrush)
13.content:
You felt a sharp pain going through most of your body. You remembered going for a bit of a hike before falling down a hole. The hole was deep and the fall was very long. it was probably a miracle that you survived at all. In fact your body was still in incredible shape all things considered. No broken bones or crushed limbs. The most you had were some bruises and the aforementioned pain. But you didn't have much time to investigate your body's condition before you passed out shortly after.

When you finally woke back up you noticed that you were no longer in the area where you landed, but seeming inside on a large bed of some sort. And when we say large bed, we mean gigantic. This thing seemed as big as a city block to you. It was undeniably soft and comfortable to you, but why was it so massive? And for that matter how did you get here? Your mind dreaded to go to the obvious answer, that someone massive enough to use this bed found you and took you to his or her home. You wanted to just hope this was some dream and that you'd wake up back at the spot you landed with no giant monsters around.

Quickly you pretended to fall back asleep hoping this would cause them to leave you alone. Though you cautiously peeked with one eye to get a better look at the figure and what you saw almost caused your heart to stop right there. This ... this thing was gargantuan. By her scale, the bed you were on probably wasn't intended for anyone larger than a child. You did your best to maintain the facade of you sleeping, utterly terrified of this monster. And that monster comment wasn't just because of her immense size. The creature clearly was not human. Though she seemed to have some human-like features, she appeared to be some sort of goat demon in a purple dress. You kept your eyes shut here unaware of what she was doing and what she was planning. "Poor thing is still asleep. He must have been in worse shape than I thought. I better check up on him later. He's less than an foot tall... better watch yourself and myself too." With that you felt the gentle shakes as she walked out of the room. When you were certain that she was gone, you opened your eyes and sat up, trying to take this all in.

Apparently this... goat woman thing found you after you passed out and left you here. You took a few deep breaths as you looked around some more. The room you were in looked like any average bedroom you've seen, just much much bigger. It didn't appear to be a prison of sorts. And the creature didn't appear malicious from what you've seen. Quite the opposite actually. Still you only encountered for for roughly a minute, and who knows how different that could have been if she knew you were awake?

As dangerous as this might actually be, you needed to get out of here. Or at least stay hidden for a bit until you understand this goat and her intentions a bit better. Thankfully, the blanket that covered you stretched down to the floor, allowing you to slide down harmlessly. You made your way to the door, which alone was a fairly long trek due tot he size. You silently pondered if she was actually this large or if you had somehow shrunk. You couldn't imagine what trees would be like to make the lumber for some of the furniture here. Perhaps she did do this to you. Your suspicion grew a bit, but for now you just wanted to play it safe and make sure before getting her attention or getting the hell out of there.
13.title: Meet Toriel (Unaware/Aware)

choices: Only stares or masturbate yourself against the soft sock (Aware or Unaware)
134.content: You walk toward the goat lady and couldn't help yourself but admire her enormous beauty especially her feet her giant soft paws, you notice that she was wearing socket? You decide to not question anymore and goes to the feet. And you can't help yourself but stare and hypnotized by her feet. She was reading her book while you...

135.content:
Even you barely one foot tall you manage reach the larger intimidated couch and climbs which take awhile as seems the Goat Lady was doing something on the kitchen and wait for her to return.
After minutes you finally on the large space of the couch if the normal giantess you meet didn't have this larger that this toriel must be 9'2" foot tall, she must be really large.

You are thinking at how grab attention from the goat lady until... feel sleepily as you didn't expected to be so confy, so you lied down on your back and fall asleep. You realize it may be a while before she comes across you, so you decide to sit in her arm chair. You ended up sinking into the seat. The chair was a lot comfier than it looked, and given the size of it, you could easily lie down and fall asleep...

..and that's exactly what you do.

...

You woke up a little while later. You were still as comfortable as you fell asleep. You slowly rised from the arm chair, groggily rubbing one eye and making it jiggle slightly.

You took a look around the room to see if goat lady showed up. After hours, You see the lady that save your life Toriel enter the room. By the way she smelled, she most likely has been taking care of some flowers.

You saw her reach up and take a book off her shelf, before she started to walk towards the chair. Oddly enough, it was like she didn't see you. You sat upright, hoping she would at least notice you before she sits down.

1352.content:
You almost subconsciously shout "MISS!" as you watch Toriel's derrière descend onto you. You're trapped on the chair. Toriel's blocking you, the sides of the chair block you, and the back of the chair blocks you. You can't do anything as you're sandwiched between her rump and the chair. Your gooey form molds as Toriel sits on top of you. The goat-like being's snout wrinkles as she feels a strange sensation underneath her rear.

"Hm?" Toriel ponders. She rubs her rump on top of you, grinding you into her chair. "What's happened with my chair?" She gets up and turned around to check out her chair. As far as she can tell, her cushion is fine, and it was. That's because you're stuck to her backside. Your trying to squirm off of her...

choices: She doesn't notice for the entire book
She finally feels you under her.
She did knew but playful stays unaware, bounce and smothers you
13521.content:
Despite all your squirming, you simply couldn't get her to notice you. The motherly goat simply shrugged and sat back down, pressing you even further to her backside. What's even worse, you could hear the very faint sound of a page turning. She was now reading, and because of that, she was less likely to notice you under her.

With that knowledge, you began struggling twice as hard to get her attention. At this point, escaping was more or less just a waste of energy, so you were hoping to at least get her attention, instead of just having to endure being flattened under her rump for the duration of however long the book she picked was...

choices: Maybe Toriel wants to have a nap or a bath.
Toriel smiles at this and goes to Room for mate season with you...
135211.content:
Toriel would shift in her chair every few page turns making your efforts of getting her attention less and less likely to succeed, you felt yourself start to get more and more tired as you kept trying to squirm your flattened body. After what felt like hours(really only like 45 minutes) you heard the book close and felt Toriel start to stand up.

"Finally" you subconsciously say as you feel your form getting pulled up with her massive butt. Toriel walked over to her bookcase and returned the book to it's rightful spot, unknowingly grinding you body further into her backside. As Toriel contemplated what to do since she finished her book her body swayed slightly forcing you to feel all the motions her behind was feeling.

14.title: Meet Nice Flowey then meet Toriel (Unaware/Aware)

choices: LOAD with half of a Foot tall (Aware)
LOAD with half of a Foot tall (Unaware)
141.content:
“Ow...” you mutter as you sit back up. Looking around you could see that the petal of a gold colored flower was what broke your fall. You look up and see the sun coming through the hole you fell through far above. Wow. This was a really soft flower. You better try and find a way to get back to the surface. No one knew you were down here and even if they did what normal would go help a micro of all people!?
You carefully climbed down the flower and get your bearings. The walls of the cavern were far too steep for you to climb. Getting out of this cave by simply climbing out would be impossible due to the steepness of the walls and sheer height even for a normal sized person. You guessed the hole was maybe a half a mile maybe more straight up. That had to have been a really soft flower. Taking a deep breath, you began to make your way through the flower patch. Maybe there was another way out deeper in the cave? As you walked along you heard some rustling in the flower patch. Was it a bug!?Spiders really didn’t hesitate to take a bite out of a micro and ants were little monsters! Before you could turn around to investigate you heard a voice that made a chill run up your back.
“Well well well.... What do we have here?” You turn around and see something that made you wonder if you hit your head duringthe fall. One of the flowers was looking at you. It had a pair of eyes and mouth. The flower was looking at you with interest though its gaze made you very uncomfortable. It’s eyes despite their cute look were cold and calculating. It was then you noticed the long eyelashes the flower had and you took note of the rosy red ‘cheeks’ that were omits face. Was this flower a girl!?
“Now I’ve seen everything. A tiny human!” the flower exclaimed with a feminine squeaky voice. Before you could react a vine popped out of the ground and wrapped around your waist. The vine brought you right in front of the flower’s eyes probably so she could inspect more closely. To your surprise while she did this a red heart shaped orb appeared in front of you.
“Now this is interesting!” the flower said, “While you are the size of a inches you still have a normal human SOUL!”
“Uh... excuse me. Miss Flower, ma’am.” you say nervously “What’s a SOUL?” The flower looks at you and seems to be chewing over not only whether to tell you or not but also whether she should crush you then and there. Soon the flower’s thinking expression left her face and was replaced by a wide smile. All the bad vibes you were getting from the flower instantly disappeared and was replaced by feelings of friendliness and compassion.
“Call me Flowey, sweetie.” she said, giving you a wink. “To answer your question a SOUL is the culmination of your very being!”
“My being?” you say.
“Yep. Everything that’s you is inside that little heart. If anything were to happen to it...well.” Flowey made a slashing motion at her ‘neck’ with one of her vines. That made you sink a little lower.
“Don’t worry little guy.” she said, “That SOUL can be toughened up! All you need is some Senergy!”
“Senergy?” you say confused.
“Sexual Energy” Flowey states before the tip of a vine works its way between your legs. You gasp as the vine dexterity wraps around your cock and start moving it back and forth. You could only moan as Flowey massaged your penis. Due to your small size clothing was had.
"That’s right.” Flowey purrs, “Let’s big sis take care of everything...”
Flowey held you up in front of her face and opened her mouth wide. You look warily into her cavernous mouth. Her large big tongue was waggling playfully and saliva dripped from her large white fangs. It wasn’t uncommon for many micros to end up in the stomach of a normal human but you had a feeling this wasn’t what Flowey had in mind. She continued jerking you off until you released your seed which fell on her waiting. Tongue. Flowey closed her mouth and hummed.
“Not bad. I almost expected not to taste anything.” she said. “Feel different?” Now that she mentioned it you actually did. You felt energized. Like you could take on the world. In your mind’s eye you could see the number 0.7 next to the letters HP. That number soon rose to 0.9 which honestly wasn’t that much of a difference. “You are still growing but still dangerous at your size so I don’t expect you to last that long in a fight.” Said Flowey, “Your best bet is to get them to share some Senergy with you. You’ll need it on your journey.”
“Journey?” you say.
“Oh yeah. The only way out of here is the barrier keeping all us monster girls trapped in the Underground at the far end of the cavern.” said Flowey, placing you on the ground.
‘Monster Girls!?’ you thought. You had heard the legends but you didn’t think they could be true! “Are you going to help me?” you ask
“Me?” said Flowey “Oh sorry but I can’t. I’m terribly busy. I’ll try to give you help now and again but you’ll mostly be going it alone. Good luck little guy. You’re gonna need it...”
Before you could say anything else Flowey disappeared down into the ground. Guess you really were doing this alone. Taking a deep breath you started walking. Hopefully this Underground wasn’t too dangerous. As you walked along something caught your eye. There was a large doorway that led out of the room you were in but that wasn’t what had your attention. What did have it was a glowing golden orb right next to the doorway. It was floating at your height and for some reason it was drawing you in. You reach out your hand and...
[SAVE?]
You had no idea what that orb did so you continued on. The next room wasn’t anything too exciting. You could already see the door leading out. Unfortunately the door was at the top of a set of stairs. Stairs, a micro’s worst enemy. Stairs were the reason every micro had to be really good at climbing. Thankfully the stairs appeared old and worn meaning there were plenty of cracks for you to use as handholds. Once you reached the top of the steps you allowed yourself to take a rest. It took you an hour to climb several steps. Traveling for a micro was an unpleasant and physically taxing affair. Hopefully the Underground wasn’t too big or this would take you years! As you rested you felt something. As you wondered what it could be it happened again but a bit stronger. Then again and again getting stronger each time. Your eyes widened as you realized what this meant. Someone was coming and here you were sitting directly in front of the doorway!
You quickly stood up so you could run and hide but it was too late. You found yourself covered in shadow. You only had enough time to look up to see the pink pads on the bottom of a white three toed paw come down upon you. Despite the pad being somewhat soft the sheer weight of the being above made your survival unlikely. As the flesh settles around you entrapping your body you hear an audible snap. You suddenly feel immense pain coming from your arms and legs. You try to scream but it comes out muffled due to the fleshy pad covering your mouth. Without warning the pressure increases tenfold causing you to scream into the being’s flesh pleading for it to stop. In a few seconds your bones are shattered, your eyeballs pop out, and your organs smashed as your tiny body is grinded into the floor by the gigantic white paw. Looks like your journey ended before it could even begin...
[GAME OVER]
[LOAD SAVE?]
Toriel walked through the Ruins on her way to the flower patch. This was both to tend the flowers and check to see if anyone had fallen down. It had been quite some time since a human had ended up in the Underground. So many had ended up dead despite her best efforts. She couldn’t stomach the thought of losing another... As she was walking along she felt something beneath her right paw. Did she step on a poor bug by accident? She didn’t want to leave the poor creature in agony so she decided to put it tout of its misery. Balancing on her sole she began putting as much pressure as she could on the little bug. She wanted to cause it as little pain as possible. It wasn’t its fault. It was crawling on the floor minding its own business and she had to go and step on it. She soon felt a miniscule pop beneath her sole and a small wet spot. She grinded her paw into the ground for good measure. She then lifted her paw to get a look at the results. There on her pink sole was a bright red smear. That’s odd. She never heard of a bug with red blood before. She shrugged and placed her foot back down. She better go and checking the flowers. If someone had fallen down they would need her help. She wouldn’t let another human die on her watch...
141.title: Unaware (Crushed)

choices: Wait for a moment, until something happen (You Climb Toriel, Unaware)
Toriel feel an itches (Toriel notices You crush between her toes, Unaware)
Toriel feel an itches and notices you (Gentle, Aware)
